SELECT `s` . `id` FROM `software` `s` LEFT JOIN `software_host_counts` `shc` ON `s` . `id` = `shc` . `software_id` WHERE `shc` . `software_id` IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT ? FROM `host_software` `hsw` WHERE `hsw` . `software_id` = `s` . `id` ) LIMIT ?

TYPE = ? ) WHERE `lm` . `host_id` = ? AND `pt` . `target_id` = ? ) WHERE `p` . `pack_type` IS NULL ) UNI
